title: Assistant Store Manager - Star Bazaar - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Star Bazaar - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Star Bazaar! We are hiring a Assistant Store Manager for our Ludhiana team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Star Bazaar:
Star Bazaar is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Star Bazaar!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
